step_rationale: M2 macrophage marker; immune-regulation in plaque inflammation.
mechanism: ARG1 marks alternatively-activated macrophages that modulate inflammatory responses and plaque stability during acute coronary syndrome.

references.title: Novel Biomarker Identification for Acute Coronary Syndrome via Integrating WGCNA and Machine Learning.
Key immune-related hub genes BTK, ITGAL and PTX3 mediate macrophage phenotypic shift and foam cell formation in the periodontitis-atherosclerosis axis.
